description.description: Specifies additional information about the policy, which can be utilized for identification or description purposes.

display_name.description: Determines the user-friendly name for the policy, often used for display purposes in interfaces.

enforce.description: Indicates whether the policy should be strictly enforced; true enables enforcement, while false allows for monitoring without enforcement.

identity.description: Defines a set of identities associated with the policy, including identity IDs and tenant information, required for access control and authentication.

metadata.description: Contains arbitrary metadata related to the policy, which can include tags or annotations for organizational purposes.

name.description: Specifies the exact name of the policy, which is used for identification and must be unique within the scope of the configuration.

non_compliance_message.description: Defines messages that are displayed when the policy is violated, including specific content and optional references to policy definitions.

not_scopes.description: Lists specific scopes that should be excluded from the policy, allowing for exceptions in policy application.

overrides.description: Specifies policy override values and conditions, enabling customization of policy behavior based on selectors.
overrides.type: list(object({value: string,selectors: list(object({in: optional(list(string)),kind: optional(string),not_in: optional(list(string))}))}))

parameters.description: Holds parameters for the policy, which might include settings or configurations necessary for policy execution.

policy_definition_id.description: Identifies the specific policy definition that this policy is based on, required for linking to the correct policy logic.

resource_selectors.description: Defines criteria for selecting resources to which the policy applies, including specific names and conditions.
resource_selectors.type: list(object({name: optional(string),selectors: list(object({in: optional(list(string)),kind: string,not_in: optional(list(string))}))}))

timeouts.description: Sets timeout durations for various operations related to the policy, such as create, update, read, and delete actions.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
